mapper.select: SELECT MIN(position_id) AS position_id, position_name, CASE position_name WHEN '팀장' THEN 1 WHEN '팀원' THEN 3 ELSE MIN(position_level) END AS position_level, MIN(created_at) AS created_at FROM positions WHERE position_name IN ('팀장', '팀원') GROUP BY position_name ORDER BY CASE position_name WHEN '팀장' THEN 1 WHEN '팀원' THEN 2 ELSE 99 END
SELECT position_id, position_name, position_level, created_at FROM positions WHERE position_name = #{positionName} ORDER BY position_id LIMIT 1
